# Jentix

> Jentix is a travel intelligence platform for travel management companies (TMCs). It captures every booking in one record and turns it into live performance analytics, consultant targets, carbon insight, duty-of-care monitoring and client-ready reporting - with a secure, white-label client portal.

Jentix is sold to travel management companies and corporate travel agencies. Everything works off a single unified travel record: a consultant's booking is captured and is reportable the moment it is made, so reporting is live on the business being written today.

## What Jentix does
- Unified travel record: flights, hotels, rail, car hire and transfers - twelve booking types in all - in a single model, attributed to who created and changed each booking.
- Live performance analytics by consultant, team, division and agency.
- Duty of care: official government travel advisories (UK FCDO, US State Department) and GDACS disaster alerts, monitored around the clock and matched to travellers' actual bookings - who is in an affected country now, who arrives next, with in-app alerts and an optional client-portal view.
- Consultant targets and incentives: tiered schemes with gates, a live My Targets page with a projected bonus for every consultant, and payout reports with a full audit trail.
- Supplier analytics and drill-downs across air, rail, car and hotel.
- Traveller intelligence: departure and arrival manifests, traveller tracking, booking lead-time analysis and advance-purchase savings.
- A client-safe, white-label client portal: corporate clients self-serve their own travel, trips and reports; margin, markup and supplier costs can never be exposed to them.
- 50+ self-serve reports across 13 categories that run live, export to PDF, CSV and Excel, can be shared straight to a client's dashboard, or sent as a secure link with expiry and access logging.
- Trip itineraries.
- Sustainability: a carbon (CO2e) figure on every booking, with defensible factors and a confidence level, for client ESG reporting.

## Who it is for
Travel management companies (TMCs) and corporate travel agencies.

## Company
Jentix is founder-led: built, run and supported by Tyrone Francis (Jentix Ltd,
Company No. 16873303, registered in England and Wales). It was designed inside
the day-to-day of business travel. More: https://jentix.io/about.html
